meaning: adj.在附近的adv.在附近地 prep.近于
examples: I had to pay nigh on forty dollars for it.
Defence was well-nigh impossible against such opponents.
After running seven miles or so, Pinocchio was well-nigh exhausted.
Now here's the sad news: navigating menus is nigh impossible, according to the Penny Arcade Report.
Now that me and Lloyd saw its end might be nigh, hope broke over us.
